title: Verify complete evidence-state accounting
preconditions: Requests cover every active and deferred metric or signal kind and every typed unavailability reason.
steps: Return supported exact metrics alongside unavailable, insufficient, not-started, and deferred signals; inject whole-report coherence, compatibility, integrity, and arithmetic failures.
expected: Every requested kind appears exactly once with the correct typed state; signal-local gaps preserve supported metrics; whole-report failures emit no report.
